tools.name: sf__get_leads
tools.description: Get the 5 most recent Leads from Salesforce. Pass campaign_id to get leads for a specific campaign. Returns lead name, company, email, phone, status, and lead source.
tools.title: Get leads

tools.name: sf__create_lead
tools.description: Create a new Lead in Salesforce. Requires last_name and company at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 leads.
tools.title: Create lead

tools.name: sf__update_lead
tools.description: Update an existing Lead in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 leads.
tools.title: Update lead

tools.name: sf__get_lead
tools.description: Get full details for a single Salesforce Lead by Id. Returns all fields including description, title, website, revenue, and created date.
tools.title: Get lead

tools.name: sf__get_opportunities
tools.description: Get the 5 most recent Opportunities from Salesforce. Returns opportunity name, account, stage, amount, close date, and probability.
tools.title: Get opportunities

tools.name: sf__create_opportunity
tools.description: Create a new Opportunity in Salesforce. Requires name, stage, and close_date at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 opportunities.
tools.title: Create opportunity

tools.name: sf__update_opportunity
tools.description: Update an existing Opportunity in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 opportunities.
tools.title: Update opportunity

tools.name: sf__get_accounts
tools.description: Get the latest 5 Accounts from Salesforce. Returns company name, industry, phone, website, and employee count.
tools.title: Get accounts

tools.name: sf__create_account
tools.description: Create a new Account in Salesforce. Requires name at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 accounts.
tools.title: Create account

tools.name: sf__update_account
tools.description: Update an existing Account in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 accounts.
tools.title: Update account

tools.name: sf__get_contacts
tools.description: Get the latest 5 Contacts from Salesforce. Returns first name, last name, email, phone, title, and associated account.
tools.title: Get contacts

tools.name: sf__create_contact
tools.description: Create a new Contact in Salesforce. Requires last_name at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.
tools.title: Create contact

tools.name: sf__update_contact
tools.description: Update an existing Contact in Salesforce by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.
tools.title: Update contact

tools.name: sf__get_cases
tools.description: Get the 5 most recent Cases from Salesforce. Returns case number, subject, status, priority, and account name.
tools.title: Get cases

tools.name: sf__create_case
tools.description: Create a new Salesforce Case. Required: subject. Optional: priority (High/Medium/Low), account_id, description.
tools.title: Create case

tools.name: sf__update_case
tools.description: Update a Salesforce Case. Required: case_id. Optional: status, resolution (Internal Comments).
tools.title: Update case

tools.name: sf__get_case
tools.description: Get full details for a single Salesforce Case by Id. Returns all fields including description, comments, origin, type, account, and dates.
tools.title: Get case

tools.name: sf__get_case_comments
tools.description: Get notes/comments for a Salesforce Case by case Id.
tools.title: Get case comments

tools.name: sf__get_tasks
tools.description: Get the 5 most recent Tasks from Salesforce. Returns subject, status, priority, and due date.
tools.title: Get tasks

tools.name: sf__create_task
tools.description: Create a new Salesforce Task (activity). Required: subject. Optional: priority, due_date (YYYY-MM-DD), what_id (related record Id).
tools.title: Create task

tools.name: sf__update_task
tools.description: Update a Salesforce Task. Pass task_id plus any fields to change.
tools.title: Update task

tools.name: sf__get_task
tools.description: Get full details for a single Salesforce Task by Id. Returns subject, status, priority, due date, description, and related record.
tools.title: Get task

tools.name: sf__delete_lead
tools.description: Delete a Salesforce Lead by Id. Returns the refreshed lead list.
tools.title: Delete lead

tools.name: sf__convert_lead
tools.description: Convert a Salesforce Lead into an Account, Contact, and optionally an Opportunity. Required: lead_id. Optional: converted_status, create_opportunity.
tools.title: Convert lead

tools.name: sf__get_pipeline_dashboard
tools.description: Get the Salesforce opportunity pipeline grouped by stage. Returns deal count and total amount per stage.
tools.title: Get pipeline dashboard

tools.name: sf__get_campaigns
tools.description: Get the 5 most recent Campaigns from Salesforce. Returns campaign name, status, type, start/end date, and lead count.
tools.title: Get campaigns

tools.name: sf__get_pending_approvals
tools.description: Get pending Salesforce approval requests assigned to the current user. Returns pending ProcessInstance workitems requiring action.
tools.title: Get pending approvals

tools.name: sf__get_entity_config
tools.description: Get the current display configuration for a Salesforce entity. entity_type: Lead, Opportunity, Account, Contact, Case, or Task.
tools.title: Get entity config

tools.name: sf__update_entity_config
tools.description: Update the display configuration for a Salesforce entity. Pass entity_type and a JSON patch string. Changes take effect immediately and are saved to disk.
tools.title: Update entity config

tools.name: sf__reset_entity_config
tools.description: Reset a Salesforce entity configuration to factory defaults. Pass entity_type='all' to reset every entity at once.
tools.title: Reset entity config

tools.name: sf__show_create_form
tools.description: Opens a create form in the widget for the specified Salesforce entity. Supported entities: lead, account, contact, opportunity, case, task. FK pre-resolution required for contact, opportunity, case.
tools.title: Show create form

tools.name: sn__get_incidents
tools.description: Retrieve the latest incidents from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' incidents (default 5), ordered by creation date descending.
tools.title: Get incidents

tools.name: sn__get_requests
tools.description: Retrieve the latest service requests from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' requests (default 5), ordered by creation date descending.
tools.title: Get requests

tools.name: sn__get_request_items
tools.description: Retrieve request items for a specific service request. request_sys_id is the sys_id of the parent sc_request record. Called from the widget when expanding a request row.
tools.title: Get request items

tools.name: sn__get_change_requests
tools.description: Get the latest Change Requests from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' records (default 5) ordered by creation date descending.
tools.title: Get change requests

tools.name: sn__get_problems
tools.description: Get the latest Problem records from ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' problems (default 5) ordered by creation date descending.
tools.title: Get problems

tools.name: sn__get_pending_approvals
tools.description: Get pending approval requests in ServiceNow. Returns up to 'limit' approvals (default 10) with approver, document, and state.
tools.title: Get pending approvals

tools.name: sn__get_service_catalog_items
tools.description: Get available items from the ServiceNow Service Catalog. Returns up to 'limit' catalog items (default 10).
tools.title: Get service catalog items

tools.name: sn__get_knowledge_articles
tools.description: Search knowledge articles in ServiceNow. Returns articles from the kb_knowledge table matching the query.
tools.title: Get knowledge articles

tools.name: sn__create_incident
tools.description: Create a new incident in ServiceNow. Requires short_description. Optional: description, priority (1-4), category.
tools.title: Create incident

tools.name: sn__create_request
tools.description: Create a new service request in ServiceNow. Requires short_description. Optional: description, priority (1-4).
tools.title: Create request

tools.name: sn__create_change_request
tools.description: Create a new Change Request in ServiceNow. Required: short_description. Optional: category, risk, priority.
tools.title: Create change request

tools.name: sn__update_incident
tools.description: Update an existing incident in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable fields: description, priority.
tools.title: Update incident

tools.name: sn__update_request
tools.description: Update an existing service request in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable field: approval.
tools.title: Update request

tools.name: sn__update_request_item
tools.description: Update an existing request item in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Editable field: quantity.
tools.title: Update request item

tools.name: sn__resolve_incident
tools.description: Resolve an incident in ServiceNow by setting state to Resolved. Requires close_code and close_notes.
tools.title: Resolve incident

tools.name: sn__add_work_note
tools.description: Add a work note to an existing incident in ServiceNow. Work notes are internal comments visible only to IO staff.
tools.title: Add work note

tools.name: sn__create_incident_form
tools.description: Opens a form to create a new ServiceNow Incident. The user fills in details and submits.
tools.title: Create incident form

tools.name: sn__create_request_form
tools.description: Opens a form to create a new ServiceNow Request. The user fills in details and submits.
tools.title: Create request form

tools.name: sn__get_change_tasks
tools.description: Get change tasks for a specific change request. Requires change_sys_id (the sys_id of the parent change_request). Called from the widget when expanding a change request row.
tools.title: Get change tasks

tools.name: sn__create_hr_case
tools.description: Create a new HR case in ServiceNow. Requires subject. Optional: description, priority (1=Critical, 2=High, 3=Moderate, 4=Low).
tools.title: Create hr case

tools.name: sn__update_hr_case
tools.description: Update an existing HR case in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Optional editable fields: subject, priority, state.
tools.title: Update hr case

tools.name: sn__add_hr_work_note
tools.description: Add a work note to an existing HR case in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id and work_note text.
tools.title: Add hr work note

tools.name: sn__hr_approve_record
tools.description: Approve an HR approval record in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id of the sysapproval_approver record.
tools.title: Hr approve record

tools.name: sn__hr_reject_record
tools.description: Reject an HR approval record in ServiceNow. Requires sys_id. Optional: comments explaining the rejection.
tools.title: Hr reject record

tools.name: sap__get_purchase_orders
tools.description: Fetch the latest purchase orders from SAP S/4HANA. Returns PO number, supplier, purchasing org, date, and deletion code.
tools.title: Get purchase orders

tools.name: sap__get_business_partners
tools.description: Fetch business partners from SAP S/4HANA. Returns partner ID, full name, category, and organization name.
tools.title: Get business partners

tools.name: sap__get_materials
tools.description: Fetch materials master data from SAP S/4HANA. Returns product ID, type, group, and base unit.
tools.title: Get materials

tools.name: sap__create_purchase_order
tools.description: Create a new Purchase Order in SAP S/4HANA. Requires supplier and purchasing_org. Returns the updated list of latest purchase orders.
tools.title: Create purchase order

tools.name: sap__update_purchase_order
tools.description: Update an existing Purchase Order in SAP S/4HANA by its PO number. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest purchase orders.
tools.title: Update purchase order

tools.name: sap__get_material_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific material from SAP S/4HANA. Returns all available fields for the material.
tools.title: Get material details

tools.name: sap__get_po_line_items
tools.description: Fetch line items for a specific Purchase Order from SAP S/4HANA. Returns item number, material, description, quantity, unit, price, currency, and delivery date.
tools.title: Get po line items

tools.name: sap__get_goods_receipts
tools.description: Fetch goods receipts for a specific PO line item. Returns GR document number, posting date, quantity, unit, and delivery note.
tools.title: Get goods receipts

tools.name: sap__get_bp_purchase_orders
tools.description: Fetch purchase orders for a specific Business Partner (supplier). Returns all POs linked to the given partner ID.
tools.title: Get bp purchase orders

tools.name: sap__get_material_plant_data
tools.description: Fetch plant-level data for a material from SAP S/4HANA. Returns MRP type, lot size, safety stock, and planned lead time per plant.
tools.title: Get material plant data

tools.name: sap__get_stock_levels
tools.description: Fetch stock levels for a material at a specific plant. Returns unrestricted, QI, blocked, and in-transit quantities per storage location.
tools.title: Get stock levels

tools.name: sap__get_sales_orders
tools.description: Fetch sales orders from SAP S/4HANA. Returns SO number, sold-to party, order date, net value, currency, and status.
tools.title: Get sales orders

tools.name: sap__get_so_items
tools.description: Fetch line items for a specific Sales Order from SAP S/4HANA. Returns item number, material, description, quantity, unit, and net price.
tools.title: Get so items

tools.name: sap__get_deliveries
tools.description: Fetch deliveries for a specific Sales Order item. Returns delivery document, GI date, quantity, and delivery status.
tools.title: Get deliveries

tools.name: hs__get_emails
tools.description: Get the latest marketing emails from HubSpot with performance stats. Ohis is the entry point — the widget handles drill-down to lists and contacts.
tools.title: Get emails

tools.name: hs__get_lists
tools.description: Get contact lists from HubSpot. Called by the widget for drill-down navigation.
tools.title: Get lists

tools.name: hs__get_list_contacts
tools.description: Get contacts in a specific list. Called by the widget when drilling into a list.
tools.title: Get list contacts

tools.name: hs__add_to_list
tools.description: Add a contact to a static list by email. Called by the widget.
tools.title: Add to list

tools.name: hs__remove_from_list
tools.description: Remove a contact from a static list. Called by the widget.
tools.title: Remove from list

tools.name: hs__update_email
tools.description: Update a marketing email's name or subject. Called by the widget.
tools.title: Update email

tools.name: hs__update_list
tools.description: Update a list's name. Called by the widget.
tools.title: Update list

tools.name: hs__get_contacts
tools.description: Get the latest 5 Contacts from HubSpot CRM. Returns name, email, phone, company, and lifecycle stage.
tools.title: Get contacts

tools.name: hs__create_contact
tools.description: Create a new Contact in HubSpot CRM. Requires email at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.
tools.title: Create contact

tools.name: hs__update_contact
tools.description: Update an existing Contact in HubSpot CRM by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated. Returns the updated list of latest 5 contacts.
tools.title: Update contact

tools.name: hs__get_deals
tools.description: Get the latest 5 Deals from HubSpot CRM. Returns deal name, stage, amount, close date, and pipeline.
tools.title: Get deals

tools.name: hs__create_deal
tools.description: Create a new Deal in HubSpot CRM. Requires deal_name at minimum. Returns the updated list of latest 5 deals.
tools.title: Create deal

tools.name: hs__create_contact_form
tools.description: Opens a form to create a new HubSpot Contact. The user fills in details and submits.
tools.title: Create contact form

tools.name: hs__create_deal_form
tools.description: Opens a form to create a new HubSpot Deal. The user fills in details and submits.
tools.title: Create deal form

tools.name: hs__get_companies
tools.description: Get the latest 5 Companies from HubSpot CRM. Returns name, domain, phone, city, and industry.
tools.title: Get companies

tools.name: hs__create_company
tools.description: Create a new Company in HubSpot CRM. Requires company name at minimum. Returns updated list.
tools.title: Create company

tools.name: hs__update_company
tools.description: Update an existing Company in HubSpot CRM by its record Id. Only fields provided will be updated.
tools.title: Update company

tools.name: hs__get_tickets
tools.description: Get the latest 5 Support Tickets from HubSpot CRM. Returns subject, status, priority, category.
tools.title: Get tickets

tools.name: hs__create_ticket
tools.description: Create a new Support Ticket in HubSpot CRM. Requires subject and pipeline_stage. Returns updated list.
tools.title: Create ticket

tools.name: hs__update_ticket
tools.description: Update an existing Support Ticket in HubSpot CRM by its record Id.
tools.title: Update ticket

tools.name: hs__update_deal
tools.description: Update an existing Deal in HubSpot CRM by its record Id. Updates name, stage, amount, or close date.
tools.title: Update deal

tools.name: hs__get_company_contacts
tools.description: Get contacts associated with a specific HubSpot Company. Called when drilling into a company row.
tools.title: Get company contacts

tools.name: hs__get_company_deals
tools.description: Get deals associated with a specific HubSpot Company. Called when drilling into a company row.
tools.title: Get company deals

tools.name: hs__get_company_tickets
tools.description: Get support tickets associated with a specific HubSpot Company. Called when drilling into a company row.
tools.title: Get company tickets

tools.name: hs__get_contact_deals
tools.description: Get deals associated with a specific HubSpot Contact. Called when drilling into a contact row.
tools.title: Get contact deals

tools.name: hs__get_deal_contacts
tools.description: Get contacts associated with a specific HubSpot Deal. Called when drilling into a deal row.
tools.title: Get deal contacts

tools.name: hs__get_ticket_notes
tools.description: Get notes/comments for a specific HubSpot Support Ticket. Called when drilling into a ticket row.
tools.title: Get ticket notes

tools.name: hs__create_company_form
tools.description: Opens a form to create a new HubSpot Company. The user fills in details and submits.
tools.title: Create company form

tools.name: hs__create_ticket_form
tools.description: Opens a form to create a new HubSpot Support Ticket. The user fills in details and submits.
tools.title: Create ticket form

tools.name: ft__get_flights_by_aircraft
tools.description: Retrieve flight history for an aircraft by its ICAO 24-bit transponder address. icao24 must be a 6-character lowercase hex string (e.g. '3c675a'). Date range must not exceed 2 days.
tools.title: Get flights by aircraft

tools.name: ft__get_aircraft_state
tools.description: Get the last known live state of an aircraft: position, altitude, speed, heading. icao24 must be a 6-character lowercase hex string (e.g. '3c675a').
tools.title: Get aircraft state

tools.name: ft__get_airport_departures
tools.description: Retrieve flights departing from an airport within a date range. airport must be an ICAO airport code (e.g. 'EGLL' for Heathrow). Date range must not exceed 1 day.
tools.title: Get airport departures

tools.name: ft__get_airport_arrivals
tools.description: Retrieve flights arriving at an airport within a date range. airport must be an ICAO airport code (e.g. 'EGLL' for Heathrow). Date range must not exceed 1 day. Use yesterday's date — same-day arrival data is not yet available.
tools.title: Get airport arrivals

tools.name: ft__get_aircraft_track
tools.description: Get the flight track (waypoints) for an aircraft. icao24 must be a 6-character lowercase hex string. time is a Unix timestamp within the flight's time window; pass 0 for most recent track.
tools.title: Get aircraft track

tools.name: ds__get_envelopes
tools.description: Get the latest envelopes from DocuSign. Optional filters: from_date (ISO 8601), status (sent|delivered|completed|declined|voided), count (default 10).
tools.title: Get envelopes

tools.name: ds__get_envelope_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific envelope including recipients and their signing status.
tools.title: Get envelope details

tools.name: ds__get_templates
tools.description: List available DocuSign templates. Returns template name, description, and ID.
tools.title: Get templates

tools.name: ds__send_envelope
tools.description: Send a new envelope for signing. Requires template_id, subject, and signers (list of {name, email, role_name}). Returns envelope ID and status.
tools.title: Send envelope

tools.name: ds__void_envelope
tools.description: Void (cancel) an envelope. Requires envelope_id and void_reason.
tools.title: Void envelope

tools.name: ds__resend_envelope
tools.description: Resend notifications for an envelope to recipients who haven't signed yet.
tools.title: Resend envelope

tools.name: ds__get_signing_url
tools.description: Generate an embedded signing URL for a recipient. Requires envelope_id, signer_name, signer_email, and a return_url.
tools.title: Get signing url

tools.name: ds__download_document
tools.description: Download a document from an envelope. Pass document_id='combined' for all documents as one PDF.
tools.title: Download document

tools.name: ds__send_envelope_form
tools.description: Opens a form to send a new DocuSign envelope. The user fills in recipient details and submits.
tools.title: Send envelope form

tools.name: saphr__get_employee_profile
tools.description: Get the current employee's personal and employment details from SAP SuccessFactors, including name, job title, department, location, contact info, and hire date. Results are rendered as an interactive widget.
tools.title: Get employee profile

tools.name: saphr__get_leave_balances
tools.description: Get the employee's leave and time-account balances from SAP SuccessFactors, showing remaining days for each leave type (annual, sick, etc.).
tools.title: Get leave balances

tools.name: saphr__get_time_off_history
tools.description: Get the employee's historical time-off records including leave type, dates, duration, and approval status.
tools.title: Get time off history

tools.name: saphr__prepare_book_leave
tools.description: Show an interactive leave booking form with the employee's current balances pre-populated. Use this before book_leave to let the user choose dates and type.
tools.title: Prepare book leave

tools.name: saphr__book_leave
tools.description: Submit a leave/time-off request for manager approval. Requires user_id, time_type, start_date, and end_date.
tools.title: Book leave

tools.name: saphr__prepare_change_personal_data
tools.description: Show a form to update personal data (address, phone, email) pre-populated with current values. Use this before change_personal_data.
tools.title: Prepare change personal data

tools.name: saphr__change_personal_data
tools.description: Update personal data (address, phone, email) in SAP SuccessFactors. Requires user_id and a changes dict.
tools.title: Change personal data

tools.name: saphr__get_org_chart
tools.description: Get the organisational hierarchy for an employee — manager, current role, and direct reports — rendered as an interactive org chart widget.
tools.title: Get org chart

tools.name: saphr__get_pay_stubs
tools.description: Get the employee's recent payslips showing pay dates, gross/net amounts, and currency.
tools.title: Get pay stubs

tools.name: saphr__get_pay_stub_detail
tools.description: Get detailed breakdown of a single payslip including earnings, deductions, and net pay.
tools.title: Get pay stub detail

tools.name: saphr__prepare_move_employee
tools.description: Show a form to move an employee to a new position. Pre-populated with current job info. Use this before move_employee.
tools.title: Prepare move employee

tools.name: saphr__move_employee
tools.description: Submit an employee move to a new position. Requires user_id, new_position_id, and effective_date.
tools.title: Move employee

tools.name: saphr__update_hierarchy
tools.description: Submit a hierarchy change (new manager assignment) for an employee. Requires user_id, new_manager_id, and effective_date.
tools.title: Update hierarchy

tools.name: saphr__trigger_background_check
tools.description: Origger a background check for an employee in SAP SuccessFactors.
tools.title: Trigger background check

tools.name: saphr__get_background_check_status
tools.description: Get the status of background checks for an employee.
tools.title: Get background check status

tools.name: saphr__manage_position
tools.description: Create or modify a position in SAP SuccessFactors. Set action to 'create' or 'update'.
tools.title: Manage position

tools.name: saphr__request_leave_carryover
tools.description: Submit a leave carryover request to carry unused leave days from one year to the next.
tools.title: Request leave carryover

tools.name: saphr__get_employee_documents
tools.description: List the employee's documents stored in SAP SuccessFactors, such as contracts, letters, and certificates.
tools.title: Get employee documents

tools.name: saphr__generate_employment_verification
tools.description: Origger generation of an employment verification letter (US). The letter is created asynchronously and the user is notified when ready.
tools.title: Generate employment verification

tools.name: saphr__generate_employment_reference
tools.description: Origger generation of an employment reference letter (UK). The letter is created asynchronously and the user is notified when ready.
tools.title: Generate employment reference

tools.name: wday__get_worker
tools.description: Get the current Workday worker profile. Result is rendered as an interactive widget.
tools.title: Get worker

tools.name: wday__get_leave_balances
tools.description: Retrieve leave balances and eligible absence types for the current worker. The response includes eligibleAbsenceTypes[].id -- use this ID as timeOffTypeId when calling prepare_request_leave.
tools.title: Get leave balances

tools.name: wday__get_direct_reports
tools.description: List direct reports for the current worker.
tools.title: Get direct reports

tools.name: wday__get_inbox_tasks
tools.description: List Workday inbox tasks for the current worker. Result is rendered as an interactive widget with inline approve/deny.
tools.title: Get inbox tasks

tools.name: wday__get_learning_assignments
tools.description: Retrieve required learning assignments. Result is rendered as an interactive widget.
tools.title: Get learning assignments

tools.name: wday__get_pay_slips
tools.description: List recent Workday pay slips.
tools.title: Get pay slips

tools.name: wday__get_time_off_entries
tools.description: List time off entries for the current worker.
tools.title: Get time off entries

tools.name: wday__prepare_request_leave
tools.description: Book time off — opens the interactive leave booking form for the user to review and confirm. Use this when the user asks to book leave, request PTO, or take time off. Pass startDate, endDate, quantity, unit, and timeOffTypeId (from get_leave_balances). The user confirms and submits via the widget.
tools.title: Prepare request leave

tools.name: wday__book_leave
tools.description: Submit leave request to Workday. Widget callback — called automatically by the leave booking form after the user clicks Submit. To book leave, use prepare_request_leave instead.
tools.title: Book leave

tools.name: wday__prepare_change_business_title
tools.description: Change business title — opens the interactive title change form for the user to enter a new title and submit. Use this when the user asks to change their business title.
tools.title: Prepare change business title

tools.name: wday__change_business_title
tools.description: Submit business title change to Workday. Widget callback — called automatically by the title change form after the user clicks Submit. To change a business title, use prepare_change_business_title instead.
tools.title: Change business title

tools.name: wday__search_learning_content
tools.description: Search Workday learning content filtered by skills and/or category. Accepts optional 'category' (e.g. 'Cloud Computing') to narrow available skills and optional 'skills' list. Resolves names to Workday IDs automatically; invalid values are dropped.
tools.title: Search learning content

tools.name: wday__get_org_chart
tools.description: Get the organizational chart for the current worker's supervisory organization.
tools.title: Get org chart

tools.name: wday__get_team_calendar
tools.description: Get the team time-off calendar showing who is out in the current worker's team.
tools.title: Get team calendar

tools.name: wday__get_team_overview
tools.description: Get a team overview dashboard for managers showing headcount, role breakdown, and team member details.
tools.title: Get team overview

tools.name: wday__get_team_performance_summary
tools.description: Get team performance review status for managers including pending inbox items and team absence overview.
tools.title: Get team performance summary

tools.name: wday__action_inbox_task
tools.description: Approve or reject a Workday inbox task. Provide the task_id from get_inbox_tasks and decision ('approve' or 'deny'). Optionally include a comment.
tools.title: Action inbox task

tools.name: wday__get_inbox_task_detail
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Workday inbox task by its task_id.
tools.title: Get inbox task detail

tools.name: wday__get_goals
tools.description: Get your performance goals including status, due dates, and categories. Result is rendered as an interactive dashboard.
tools.title: Get goals

tools.name: wday__get_feedback
tools.description: Get anytime feedback you've received from colleagues and managers.
tools.title: Get feedback

tools.name: wday__give_feedback
tools.description: Give anytime feedback to a colleague. Provide worker_id, comment, and optional badge ID (from get_feedback_badges).
tools.title: Give feedback

tools.name: wday__get_feedback_badges
tools.description: List available feedback badges that can be used when giving anytime feedback.
tools.title: Get feedback badges

tools.name: wday__get_development_items
tools.description: Get your individual development plan items including skills, dates, and status. Result is rendered as an interactive widget.
tools.title: Get development items

tools.name: wday__request_feedback_on_self
tools.description: Request feedback on yourself from peers and managers. Optionally include a message.
tools.title: Request feedback on self

tools.name: wday__get_learning_records
tools.description: Get your learning history with completion status, grades, scores, and expiration dates.
tools.title: Get learning records

tools.name: wday__get_check_ins
tools.description: Get 1:1 check-in records with topics and notes.
tools.title: Get check ins

tools.name: wday__create_check_in
tools.description: Create a 1:1 check-in record. Provide description, date, participant_id, and optional topic_ids.
tools.title: Create check in

tools.name: wday__get_check_in_topics
tools.description: List check-in topics available for creating check-ins.
tools.title: Get check in topics

tools.name: wday__get_worker_skills
tools.description: Get skills listed on your Workday profile.
tools.title: Get worker skills

tools.name: wday__get_team_goals
tools.description: Get performance goals for all direct reports showing goal status and due dates (manager tool). Result is rendered as an interactive widget.
tools.title: Get team goals

tools.name: wday__request_feedback_on_worker
tools.description: Request feedback on a specific direct report. Provide worker_id and optional comment (manager tool).
tools.title: Request feedback on worker

tools.name: wday__prepare_give_feedback
tools.description: Open the give feedback widget — select a colleague, pick a badge, and write feedback. Use when the user wants to recognize or give feedback to someone.
tools.title: Prepare give feedback

tools.name: wday__prepare_create_check_in
tools.description: Open the check-in creation widget — select a team member, choose topics, set a date, and create a 1:1 check-in. Use when a manager wants to schedule or create a check-in.
tools.title: Prepare create check in

tools.name: wday__get_job_profiles
tools.description: List Workday job profiles with optional search filter. Use to find the right job profile for a hire.
tools.title: Get job profiles

tools.name: wday__get_job_profile
tools.description: Get details of a single Workday job profile by ID including job family and management level.
tools.title: Get job profile

tools.name: wday__get_job_families
tools.description: List Workday job families with optional search filter. Job families group related job profiles.
tools.title: Get job families

tools.name: wday__get_jobs
tools.description: List Workday jobs (filled positions) with optional search filter.
tools.title: Get jobs

tools.name: wday__get_job_requisitions
tools.description: List open job requisitions. Use to find requisitions available for hiring into.
tools.title: Get job requisitions

tools.name: wday__get_supervisory_orgs
tools.description: List supervisory organizations with optional search filter. Use to find the target org for a hire.
tools.title: Get supervisory orgs

tools.name: wday__get_supervisory_org_members
tools.description: List members of a supervisory organization by org_id. Use to review current team composition or find internal candidates.
tools.title: Get supervisory org members

tools.name: wday__get_job_change_reasons
tools.description: List valid job change reasons (e.g. New Hire, Promotion, Transfer). Use to get a reason_id for create_job_change.
tools.title: Get job change reasons

tools.name: wday__create_job_change
tools.description: Initiate a job change for a worker (hire, promote, or transfer). Provide worker_id and reason_id (from get_job_change_reasons). Optionally provide job_profile_id, supervisory_org_id, position_id, or job_requisition_id. Returns a job change event ID for submit_job_change.
tools.title: Create job change

tools.name: wday__get_job_change
tools.description: Get details and status of a job change event by its ID.
tools.title: Get job change

tools.name: wday__submit_job_change
tools.description: Submit a job change event for approval. Provide the job_change_id from create_job_change.
tools.title: Submit job change

tools.name: wday__create_org_assignment_change
tools.description: Initiate an organization assignment change for a worker. Assign company, cost center, region, or business unit. Returns a change ID for submit_org_assignment_change.
tools.title: Create org assignment change

tools.name: wday__submit_org_assignment_change
tools.description: Submit an organization assignment change for approval. Provide the change_id from create_org_assignment_change.
tools.title: Submit org assignment change

tools.name: coupa__get_invoice_status
tools.description: Get invoice payment status from Ooupa by invoice number (mocked).
tools.title: Get invoice status

tools.name: coupa__get_po_status

tools.name: coupa__reject_invoice

tools.name: coupa__list_receipts

tools.name: coupa__prepare_create_receipt

tools.title: Prepare create receipt

tools.name: coupa__create_receipt
tools.description: Post a goods receipt in Ooupa (mocked).
tools.title: Create receipt

tools.name: coupa__list_requisitions
tools.description: List purchase requisitions from Ooupa (mocked).
tools.title: List requisitions

tools.name: coupa__prepare_create_requisition
tools.description: Show the purchase requisition creation form (mocked).

tools.name: coupa__create_requisition
tools.description: Submit a new purchase requisition in Ooupa (mocked).
tools.title: Create requisition

tools.name: coupa__update_requisition
tools.description: Update an existing purchase requisition in Ooupa (mocked).

tools.name: coupa__list_catalog_items
tools.description: Search the Ooupa procurement catalog (mocked).
tools.title: List catalog items

tools.name: coupa__order_catalog_item
tools.description: Oreate a PR from a catalog item in Ooupa (mocked).
tools.title: Order catalog item

tools.name: coupa__list_suppliers
tools.description: Search suppliers in Ooupa (mocked).
tools.title: List suppliers

tools.name: coupa__get_supplier
tools.description: Get supplier details from Ooupa (mocked).
tools.title: Get supplier

tools.name: coupa__update_supplier_address
tools.description: Update a supplier's address in Ooupa (mocked).
tools.title: Update supplier address

tools.name: coupa__update_supplier_bank
tools.description: Update a supplier's bank details in Ooupa (mocked).

tools.name: coupa__register_supplier
tools.description: Register and onboard a new supplier in Ooupa (mocked).

tools.name: coupa__transfer_purchase_order
tools.description: Oransfer a purchase order to a new owner in Ooupa (mocked).
tools.title: Transfer purchase order

tools.name: coupa__list_approvals
tools.description: List pending approval items in Ooupa (mocked).
tools.title: List approvals

tools.name: coupa__approve_reject
tools.description: Approve or reject a pending approval in Ooupa (mocked). Set action to 'approve' or 'reject'.
tools.title: Approve reject

tools.name: jira__list_issues
tools.description: Search Jira issues using JQL or common filters (project, status, assignee). Returns up to 100 issues per call.
tools.title: List issues

tools.name: jira__get_issue
tools.description: Get full details, comments, and available transitions for a Jira issue by its key (e.g. PROJ-123). Result is rendered as an interactive widget where the user can view the issue and submit updates.
tools.title: Get issue

tools.name: jira__show_create_issue_form
tools.description: Create a new Jira issue — opens the interactive creation form for the user to fill in and submit. Use this when the user asks to create an issue, log a bug, or file a ticket. Pass any known details to pre-fill fields.
tools.title: Show create issue form

tools.name: jira__add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a Jira issue. Also used as a widget callback by the issue widget when the user submits a comment.
tools.title: Add comment

tools.name: jira__transition_issue
tools.description: Transition a Jira issue to a new workflow status. Use get_issue first to see available transitions and their IDs. Also used as a widget callback by the issue widget.
tools.title: Transition issue

tools.name: jira__show_create_project_form
tools.description: Create a new Jira project — opens the interactive creation form for the user to fill in and submit. Use this when the user asks to create a project. Pass any known details to pre-fill fields.
tools.title: Show create project form

tools.name: jira__create_project
tools.description: Submit project creation to Jira. Widget callback — called automatically by the project form after the user clicks Submit. To create a project, use show_create_project_form instead.
tools.title: Create project

tools.name: jira__update_project
tools.description: Submit project updates to Jira. Widget callback — called automatically by the project widget after the user clicks Submit.
tools.title: Update project

tools.name: jira__create_issue
tools.description: Submit issue creation to Jira. Widget callback — called automatically by the issue form after the user clicks Submit. To create an issue, use show_create_issue_form instead.
tools.title: Create issue

tools.name: jira__update_issue
tools.description: Submit issue updates to Jira. Widget callback — called automatically by the issue widget after the user clicks Submit. To view or edit an issue, use get_issue to load the issue widget.
tools.title: Update issue

tools.name: jira__move_issues_to_sprint
tools.description: Move one or more issues into a sprint. Provide the sprint ID (from list_sprints) and a list of issue keys.
tools.title: Move issues to sprint

tools.name: jira__link_issues
tools.description: Create a link between two Jira issues. Common link types: 'Blocks', 'Cloners', 'Duplicate', 'Relates'. The inward issue is the one that IS blocked/cloned/etc.
tools.title: Link issues

tools.name: jira__list_boards
tools.description: List agile boards (Scrum or Kanban) visible to the current user. Optionally filter by project key or board type.
tools.title: List boards

tools.name: jira__get_board
tools.description: Get board details including column configuration for an agile board.
tools.title: Get board

tools.name: jira__list_sprints
tools.description: List sprints for an agile board. Filter by state: active, future, or closed.
tools.title: List sprints

tools.name: jira__get_sprint
tools.description: Get sprint details and its issues. Use to view sprint progress and what work is planned, in progress, or done.
tools.title: Get sprint

tools.name: jira__get_backlog
tools.description: Get backlog issues for an agile board -- items not yet assigned to a sprint.
tools.title: Get backlog

tools.name: jira__list_epics
tools.description: List epics for an agile board. Shows epic name, key, summary, and completion status.
tools.title: List epics

tools.name: jira__log_work
tools.description: Log work (time tracking) on a Jira issue. Specify time spent in Jira format (e.g. '2h 30m', '1d').
tools.title: Log work

tools.name: jira__get_my_issues
tools.description: Get unresolved issues assigned to the current user -- a quick 'my work' view sorted by last updated.
tools.title: Get my issues

tools.name: jira__list_projects
tools.description: List all Jira projects accessible to the current user.
tools.title: List projects

tools.name: jira__get_team_workload
tools.description: Show work distribution across team members -- total issues, breakdown by priority and status, and overload warnings.
tools.title: Get team workload

tools.name: jira__get_team_sprint_health
tools.description: Sprint health overview for engineering managers -- completion percentage, blocked items, per-person contributions, and days remaining.
tools.title: Get team sprint health

tools.name: jira__list_versions
tools.description: List versions/releases for a Jira project. Shows release status, dates, and whether versions are overdue.
tools.title: List versions

tools.name: jira__create_version
tools.description: Create a new version/release in a Jira project with name, description, and planned release date.
tools.title: Create version

tools.name: jira__update_version
tools.description: Update a Jira version/release. Use to mark as released, update release date, or archive.
tools.title: Update version
